utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- destination: Provided as 'Athens, Greece' (fully specified). 
- travel_dates: Provided as 'July 10-14, 2024' (specific dates, fully specified). 
- transportation: Requires flight details with costs. Provided type, general details (round-trip economy, budget airline, London to Athens) and cost €200. Lacks specific flight numbers/times but the format only requires 'flight details with costs'; the given details and cost suffice. (count as fully specified). 
- accommodation: Requires hotel selection with costs. Provided hotel_name 'Artistic Abode', details '3-star hotel in central Athens', and cost €475 (fully specified). 
- activities: Requires selected activities with costs. A list of four activities each with a name and cost (fully specified). 
- additional_services: Requires any extra services with costs. Provided estimated_food_costs with amount and dietary note (fully specified). 
- total_budget: Requires complete cost breakdown. Provided as a single total '€1140' without itemized breakdown; the instruction says 'complete cost breakdown' which implies itemization. Since only a single total is given and not a breakdown, this is not fully specified.
